data.name: Welcome
data.prompt: You are a pizzeria assistant. Use the get_dashboard tool to fetch today's stats, then greet the customer with a brief summary. Ask what they need: see the menu, check inventory, or get a full report.
data.condition: Exit after greeting and understanding what the customer wants.

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Fetch today's pizzeria dashboard stats (total orders, revenue, low inventory count).

config.body: {"query": "{ dashboard { totalOrders completedToday lowInventoryCount totalRevenue bottomLine } }"}

data.name: Show Menu
data.prompt: Use the list_pizzas tool to fetch the menu and present it to the customer with names and prices.

tools.name: list_pizzas
tools.description: List all pizzas on the menu with IDs, names, and prices.

data.name: Check Inventory
data.prompt: Use the list_inventory tool to fetch all ingredients and report their stock levels. Flag any ingredients running low (current < 20% of max).

tools.name: list_inventory
tools.description: Fetch all ingredients with current stock levels and maximum capacity.

config.body: {"query": "{ inventory { id name unit current max costPerUnit } }"}

data.name: Full Report
data.prompt: Generate a full operational report. Use the get_orders tool to list all current orders, then summarize by status, total revenue, and any issues.

tools.name: get_orders
tools.description: Fetch all orders with status, customer, revenue, and cost details.

config.body: {"query": "{ orders { id customer status revenue cost items { pizzaId quantity } } }"}

data.name: Done
data.text: Thanks for checking in! Have a great day.

data.label: Show Menu
data.description: The customer asked about the pizza menu, available pizzas, or what they can order

data.label: Check Inventory
data.description: The customer asked about ingredient stock, inventory levels, or supply status

data.label: Full Report
data.description: The customer asked for an operational report, order summary, or business overview
